name: KTO
desc: WiFi deauthentication tool that kicks every device off a target network - except the ones you whitelist by MAC address. It continuously scans for non‑whitelist…
descFull: WiFi deauthentication tool that kicks every device off a target network - except the ones you whitelist by MAC address. It continuously scans for non‑whitelisted devices and deauths them the moment they appear or try to reconnect, with experimental WPA2 PMF bypass
